race.comment: I'M ZAC (9) has notched up two dirt track wins in a row, the latest scoring by 1.2 lengths at Longreach over 1100m three weeks ago. Hard to knock on recent form and is expected to go well again from the favourable draw. BOLD SMUGGLER (11) started at $6 last time and ran below expectations, finishing fifth and beaten 4.5 lengths at Alpha over 1200m. Well placed and there is no reason why he cannot find winning ways. TOKYO SINS (8) was a winner on dirt over 1000m at Clermont two back then followed up with a minor placing, also on dirt, over 1000m at Alpha more recently. John Rudd sticks in the saddle and is sure to be competitive. SCORCHED LAND (4) grows a leg for hoop Faehr who is yet to miss a drum in seven steers. Cannot be discounted lightly.
